title: ジャパンダートダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japan Dirt Derby. Smart Falcon
is exuding confidence in her skill on dirt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, unlike in the Satsuki Sho, where the
runners were full of hope, today there's a tint of
grim determination to many of the faces in the
entrance tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some runners fall into dirt racing because they
fail to find success on turf. Some feel cornered, as
if they're at the end of the road.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This gives them a sense of standing on a cliff's
edge. Smart Falcon accepts all of that collective
pressure as she heads into the race.
